Record Class Context

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.translation.Context
Record Components:
specMathMode - The spec math mode
classType - The containing class
selfVar - self
public record Context(@NonNull SpecMathMode specMathMode, @NonNull KeYJavaType classType, LocationVariable selfVar) extends Record
Common information that is needed almost everywhere during translation. Class is immutable.

    • Context

      public Context(@NonNull SpecMathMode specMathMode, @NonNull KeYJavaType classType, LocationVariable selfVar)

      Parameters:
      specMathMode - the value for the specMathMode record component
      classType - the value for the classType record component
      selfVar - the value for the selfVar record component

      pm - program method
      tb - term builder

      Constructs a new context in the given program method using the given self var
      Parameters:
      pm - program method
      selfVar - self var

      public static Context inClass(@NonNull KeYJavaType classType, boolean isStaticContext, TermBuilder tb)
      Constructs a new context in the given class
      Parameters:
      classType - class
      isStaticContext - whether this is a static context
      tb - term builder

    • orWithSpecMathMode

      public Context orWithSpecMathMode(@Nullable SpecMathMode mode)
      Constructs a new context while entering the given spec math mode
      Parameters:
      mode - spec math mode

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

    • specMathMode

      public @NonNull SpecMathMode specMathMode()
      Returns the value of the specMathMode record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the specMathMode record component

    • classType

      public @NonNull KeYJavaType classType()
      Returns the value of the classType record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the classType record component

    • selfVar

      public LocationVariable selfVar()
      Returns the value of the selfVar record component.

      the value of the selfVar record component
